name: Sarah's Pizza Crust
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Flour (we use a blend of
recipeInstructions:
Here is our pizza dough recipe. It is quick and easy (about the same
as your dough takes to defrost, I would think). Note that we don't
use oil or salt in it. Dissolve yeast and sugar in water. Stir in flour
1/2 cup at a time. Knead for 10 minutes or so. Rise. Punch down,
rest for 10 minutes. Pat into lightly oiled pizza pan. Finish as usual.
